initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT results.time
FROM races
JOIN driverStandings ON races.raceId = driverStandings.raceId
JOIN drivers ON driverStandings.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId AND driverStandings.driverId = results.driverId
WHERE races.year = 2008
  AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
  AND driverStandings.position = 2
LIMIT 1;
